  13. catchment_area
  14. catch_in_cis_prop
  15. catch_cis_population

Socio-economic features (5 features):
  1. IMD_Score
  2. Population_Density
  3. Elderly_Ratio
  4. Overcrowding_Rate
  5. Ethnic_Diversity_Index

Additional features:
  16. median_prob (historical infection rate)
  17-27. Derived features based on past 7-day infection rates (11 features)
  28-32. Socio-economic features (5 static features)

2. Define infection rate derived features calculation...

Infection rate derived features (11 features):
   1. infection_rate_mean_7d
   2. infection_rate_std_7d
   3. infection_rate_max_7d
   4. infection_rate_min_7d
   5. infection_rate_range_7d
   6. infection_rate_trend_7d
   7. infection_rate_recent_3d_mean
   8. infection_rate_change_1d
   9. infection_rate_change_3d
  10. infection_rate_volatility_7d
  11. infection_rate_momentum_7d

Total features per timestep: 15 original + 1 infection rate + 11 derived = 27 features
Plus static socio-economic features: 5 features
Total model input: 27 × 7 timesteps + 5 static = 194 features

3. Build flexible time window data set for LSTM with all features...
Time range analysis:
  Earliest date in data: 2020-09-04
  Latest date in data: 2021-02-10
  Earliest predict date: 2020-09-11 (Day 8)

=== Data availability statistics ===
Prediction day statistics:
  Total days in data: 2398
  Days satisfying the time window requirement: 4131
  Actual days with data: 2290
  Prediction day utilization: 55.4%

History window statistics:
  Total history days: 16030
  Days with data in history: 8901
  History data coverage: 55.5%
  Average number of effective history days per sample: 3.9/7 days

Sample statistics:
  Total samples: 2290
  Average number of samples per CIS region: 84.8

=== Data set shape ===
  Sequence features: (2290, 7, 27)
  Socio-economic features: (2290, 5)
  Target vector: (2290,)
  Total number of samples: 2290

=== Feature composition ===
Time series features (each sample):
  - 7 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 6 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 5 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 4 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 3 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 2 days ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  - 1 day ago: 15 original features + 1 infection rate + 11 derived features = 27 features
  Total time series input: 27 features × 7 timesteps = 189 features

Socio-economic features (static per sample):
  1. IMD_Score
  2. Population_Density
  3. Elderly_Ratio
  4. Overcrowding_Rate
  5. Ethnic_Diversity_Index
  Total static features: 5 features

Total model input: 189 time series + 5 static = 194 features

=== Strategy validation ===
✓ Prediction day selection: Start from the 8th day of the data, ensuring a complete history window
✓ History window: Strict 7-day time window (1-7 days before the prediction day)
✓ Missing data handling: Use 0 to fill in the history window if there is no data
✓ Time boundary: Never use data from the prediction day or future
✓ Feature completeness: Include original features + historical infection rates + derived features + socio-economic features
✓ Derived features: Fully based on past 7-day infection rates
✓ Socio-economic constraint: Only use CIS regions with matching socio-economic data

4. Time-based split...
Training set: 1625 samples
Test set: 665 samples
Split date: 2020-12-25 00:00:00
Training data shape:
  Sequences: (1625, 7, 27)
  Socio-economic: (1625, 5)
Test data shape:
  Sequences: (665, 7, 27)
  Socio-economic: (665, 5)

5. Feature standardization...
Feature standardization completed
Standardized training data shape:
  Sequences: (1625, 7, 27)
  Socio-economic: (1625, 5)
Standardized test data shape:
  Sequences: (665, 7, 27)
  Socio-economic: (665, 5)
Features per timestep: 27
Socio-economic features: 5

6. Define LSTM model architecture...
Model created with:
  Sequence input size: 27 features per timestep
  Socio-economic input size: 5 features
  Hidden size: 64
  Number of LSTM layers: 2
  Total parameters: 66,657

Model architecture:
LSTMWithAllFeaturesAndDerived(
  (lstm): LSTM(27, 64, num_layers=2, batch_first=True, dropout=0.3)
  (socio_branch): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=5, out_features=32, bias=True)
    (1): ReLU()
    (2): Dropout(p=0.3, inplace=False)
    (3): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=32, bias=True)
  )
  (output_layer): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=96, out_features=64, bias=True)
    (1): ReLU()
    (2): Dropout(p=0.3, inplace=False)
    (3): Linear(in_features=64, out_features=32, bias=True)
    (4): ReLU()
    (5): Dropout(p=0.3, inplace=False)
    (6): Linear(in_features=32, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
)

7. Training setup...
Training data tensor shapes:
  Sequences: torch.Size([1625, 7, 27])
  Socio-economic: torch.Size([1625, 5])
  Targets: torch.Size([1625])
Test data tensor shapes:
  Sequences: torch.Size([665, 7, 27])
  Socio-economic: torch.Size([665, 5])
  Targets: torch.Size([665])
Training configuration:
  Epochs: 200
  Batch size: 32
  Learning rate: 0.001
  Weight decay: 1e-4
  Early stopping patience: 20

================================================================================
LSTM Version 4 model training completed (with all features including socio-economic)
================================================================================
Feature composition:
  - Time series features: 27 features/day × 7 days = 189 time series features
    * Original wastewater features: 15 features/day
    * Historical infection rate features: 1 feature/day
    * Infection rate derived features: 11 features/day
  - Socio-economic features: 5 static features
  - Total input features: 194

Infection rate derived features (11 features):
   1. infection_rate_mean_7d
   2. infection_rate_std_7d
   3. infection_rate_trend_7d
   4. infection_rate_max_7d
   5. infection_rate_min_7d
   6. infection_rate_range_7d
   7. infection_rate_recent_3d_mean
   8. infection_rate_change_1d
   9. infection_rate_change_3d
  10. infection_rate_volatility_7d
  11. infection_rate_momentum_7d

Socio-economic features (5 features):
   1. IMD_Score
   2. Population_Density
   3. Elderly_Ratio
   4. Overcrowding_Rate
   5. Ethnic_Diversity_Index

Core strategy:
  ✓ Prediction day starts from the 8th day of the data, ensuring a complete history window
  ✓ Strict 7-day time window, never use data from the prediction day
  ✓ Flexible handling of missing data, use 0 to maintain time logic
  ✓ Include infection rate data for each day in the past 7 days
  ✓ Include 11 derived features based on historical infection rates
  ✓ Include original wastewater detection features
  ✓ Include socio-economic features (static per region)
  ✓ Only use CIS regions with matching socio-economic data

Model architecture:
  ✓ Sequence input size: 27 features per timestep
  ✓ Socio-economic input size: 5 features
  ✓ Sequence length: 7 days
  ✓ Hidden size: 64
  ✓ Number of LSTM layers: 2
  ✓ Socio-economic branch: 2-layer MLP
  ✓ Combined output layers: 3-layer MLP
  ✓ Total parameters: 66,657

Final performance:
  ✓ Test set MAE: 0.0188
  ✓ Test set R²: 0.9518
  ✓ Test set RMSE: 0.0278
  ✓ Training completed in 98 epochs

Time safety validation:
  ✓ Earliest prediction day is 7 days from data start
  ✓ No future data leakage - only uses past 7 days for prediction
  ✓ Prediction date range: 2020-09-11 to 2021-02-10
  ✓ Only uses CIS regions with matching socio-economic data (27 regions)

Model capabilities:
  ✓ Handles time series patterns with LSTM
  ✓ Incorporates static regional characteristics with socio-economic features
  ✓ Captures temporal infection rate dynamics with derived features
  ✓ Combines multiple information sources for enhanced prediction
================================================================================
